theme: raise levees before an unknown storm season
title: Levee Budget Against a Storm Sweep
strategies: trivial: spread the height budget evenly across every cell (the checker's own reference construction)
greedy: rank cells by their own historical (unleveed) worst-case flood damage across the sweep and fully protect the worst cells first, cell by cell

strong: iteratively re-simulate the whole storm sweep to find which local ridge (saddle) is the binding pour-point for the most value at risk, and spend the budget raising that saddle -- rerouting overflow to the next-weakest saddle rather than chasing the deepest historical pixel
